sessions.summary: Session 1: Core idea introduced. Representation space traversal as primary mechanism. Analogy to math problem solving and GAs. Key concerns: discrete graph limits, primitive bloat, GI cost.
Session 2: Hybrid representation decided. Hierarchical layer architecture proposed. Translator as compression function. Unbounded parameter growth identified as core problem.
Session 3: Graph rewriting + genetic algorithms introduced. Misunderstandings flagged by user — self-modifying recursive interpretation was off-base.
open_threads: clarify GA role — corrected in session 4

sessions.summary: Session 4: Two transformation types defined (translation/innovation). Two-system architecture established. Layer fusion/splitting introduced.
Session 5: Fusion/splitting assigned to data system. Rewrite system feedback loop defined. Library introduced as shared structure.
Session 6: Library corrected to rule-invariant pairs. Two-layer library established (empirical + reasoned). Human capability threshold gate defined.
Session 7: KB restructured into chunks/ and index/ for efficient retrieval. session_loader updated to v0.6.0.
